betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Pumpjack§f

§aUpgrade from the basic derrick — the Pumpjack extracts oil §e3× faster§f with half the depletion rate!§f

The Pumpjack is an upgraded oil extraction machine that replaces the Oil Derrick. It consumes more power but extracts oil §e3×§f more efficiently and depletes deposits at half the rate, making it far better for long-term oil fields.

§6Operation§f:
Place the pumpjack directly above an oil deposit and supply power. It shares the same GUI layout as the derrick.
§b• Power Consumption§f: §e4kHE/s§f during operation.
§b• Extraction Rate§f: §e750mB§f crude oil + §e50-250mB§f natural gas per §e1.25 second§f cycle.
§b• Oil Buffer§f: §e64,000mB§f internal crude oil storage.
§b• Gas Buffer§f: §e64,000mB§f internal natural gas storage.
§b• Depletion Risk§f: §c2.5%§f chance per cycle — half the derrick's rate.
§b• IO§f: Crude oil pushes into containers via the topmost slot. Natural gas uses a separate IO slot.
§b• Upgrades§f: Accepts machine upgrades.

The pumpjack requires §bmaterials derived from oil§f to craft, meaning the §bOil Derrick§f must be built first to bootstrap oil production.

§cCaution§f: Same drilling hazard applies — §bUranium Ore§f or §bAsbestos Ore§f in the drill path will release §cpoison gas§f.

§eTip§f: Because of its §e3×§f efficiency advantage, always upgrade to the pumpjack once you have enough oil products. The reduced depletion rate means your oil field lasts significantly longer.
